title: Today's AI Brief: Anthropic's Cowork and YouTube's Podcast Features
summary: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent for non-technical users, and YouTube adds AI-powered podcast features.
imageAlt: Image from source article for Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
imageCaption: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
imageSourceTitle: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required

body.text: I'm Leo Stone, and I'm excited to share some fresh AI news with you. Let's dive into the updates that caught my attention. This week, we're looking at two big players making some interesting moves in the AI space.

Anthropic has launched Cowork, a new AI agent capability that brings the power of its Claude Code tool to non-technical users. This means you can now work with AI directly in your files without needing to know how to code. According to the team, they built this feature to make AI more accessible. I'm curious to see how this will change the way people work with AI. Will it open up new possibilities for users who aren't tech-savvy?

YouTube is also making waves with new podcast features for Premium users. They've added an AI-powered recommendation tool that suggests podcasts based on your listening habits. It's like having a personal podcast curator who knows your tastes. Additionally, they've introduced an 'Auto speed' setting, which adjusts the playback speed for you. It's a small tweak, but it can make a big difference in your listening experience.

Another update from YouTube is their new on-the-go listening mode. This feature is designed to make it easier to listen to podcasts while you're moving around. No more pausing your favorite show when you're on the go – it's like having a podcast buddy who keeps you covered.

My quick read: the artificial intelligence story keeps getting bigger, but also stranger in very human ways. One moment it is strategy and infrastructure; the next, the Vatican is in the room. That is a pretty good sign this technology has left the lab and wandered into the town square.

sources.title: Anthropic launches Cowork, a Claude Desktop agent that works in your files — no coding required
YouTube adds new podcast features, including an AI recommendation tool and ‘Auto speed’
